title: Social Communities Workshop
body: ![idissabtes](http://www.pimpampum.net/blog/wp-content/uploads/2007/11/LIVECINEMA2.jpg)This Saturday, at 8 p.m., the folks at [PimPamPum](http://www.pimpampum.net "PimPamPum website") are hosting a **free workshop** on online social communities ([Flickr](http://www.flickr.com/ "flickr"), [Fotolog](http://www.fotolog.com/ "fotolog"), [YouTube](http://www.youtube.com/ "youtube"), [Facebook](http://www.facebook.com/ "facebook"), [Twitter](http://www.twitter.com/ "twitter"), etc.). I’ve attended some of these workshops, and they’re fun and interactive. If you’re in Barcelona or the surrounding area, stop by CaixaForum in Montjuïc. More information at [pimpampum.net](http://www.pimpampum.net/blog/2007/11/14/taller-dintroduccio-als-mash-ups-amb-flickr/).
